0.text: More widespread centriacinar emphysematous changes in the posterior part of the upper lobes of both lungs

1.text: More widespread centriacinar emphysematous changes in the superior segment of the left lower lobe

2.text: Fibrotic recessions in the vicinity of the posterior part of the upper lobes of both lungs

3.text: Linear atelectatic changes in the medial segment of the middle lobe of the right lung

4.text: Linear atelectatic changes in the inferior lingular segment of the left lung

5.text: Linear atelectatic changes in the anteromedial basal segment of the left lower lobe

6.text: Nonspecific parenchymal nodules with a diameter of 6.5 mm in both lungs

7.text: Largest nonspecific parenchymal nodule located at the right upper lobe anterior-middle lobe junction adjacent to the minor fissure
